title: trisetum candollei
intro: Trisetum candollei, also known as Candolle's oatgrass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Trisetum candollei include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Trisetum candollei can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
